given: Two verified immutable release directories and an isolated installation root
when: The release lifecycle advances the current link and retains its predecessor
acceptance: Installation switches an immutable current release
Fresh installation opens the local Setup Center directly in the Tauri desktop shell without desktop login and presents WeChat as a required guided connection without requiring a development Agent
The desktop shell uses the system WebView, exposes no native page API, starts the local runtime when opened, stops it when closed, and remains bound to current/previous rollback
The local Console and main Agent share one digest-bound update plan, verified platform artifact, native desktop handoff, and persisted restart result
Applying executable updates requires fresh authenticated local approval and the Agent cannot approve its own operation
Tunneled access requires the local access password and password reset invalidates existing remote sessions
Browser and CLI recovery remain available
